Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3F43 "TREASUREISLE-3F43" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Treasure Isle.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The following changes were made to allow the game to run correctly from the Magic Desk cartridge:
1. Changed the LDA #$20 instruction at $F267 to LDA #$80 instead 2. Changed the STX $DE00 instruction at $F271 to STA $DE00 instead (i.e. keeps $DE00 = $80 as already set by the STA $DE00 instruction at $F26B)
These changes make sure $DE00 = $80 so that a ROM bank from the Magic cartridge is not banked in from $8000-$9FFF instead of RAM, as otherwise the game will crash.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $3FEB. However the true start address is $3F43.
